creator: jbtakk@iherebuywisely.com
text: rsync usage here which worked the same for over a decade suddenly fails between the port 8 10 2022 and 8 19 2022: if not a failure to copy because of a file with a tilde at the end, and not informing WHERE that file may be found, and if on the source or destination, ... then fails with an io.c [32] error code, broken pipe.  I had to copy a 8 16 rsync from backup to the source to continue using it.
